name: Requirements needed to construct a unique BT
category: Binary Trees [Traversals, Medium and Hard Problems]
statement: Given a pair of tree traversal, return true if a unique binary tree can be constructed otherwise false. Each traversal is represented with integer: 1 -> Preorder , 2 -> Inorder , 3 -> Postorder.

examples.explanation: Answer is True. It is possible to construct a unique binary tree. This is because the preorder traversal provides the root of the tree, and the inorder traversal helps determine the left and right subtrees.
Two inorder traversals are insufficient to uniquely determine a binary tree.
